## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behavior:

1. Go to '...'
2. Run '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages, stack traces, or logs (redact any secrets).

## Environment

- Edition: <!-- live Cloudflare Worker / production FastAPI + EKS / local dev -->
- Component: <!-- apps/api, apps/web, apps/cloudflare, infra, etc. -->
- OS / browser / runtime:
- Version or commit SHA:

## Additional context

Add any other context, screenshots, or related issues here.
